name: PVR INOX Kotak Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: Earns movie ticket vouchers on milestones

milestones.label: 1 PVR INOX Movie Ticket (worth up to ₹300) on spending ₹10,000 in a billing cycle
1 additional PVR INOX Movie Ticket (worth up to ₹300) on spending ₹20,000 in a billing cycle
1 additional PVR INOX Movie Ticket (worth up to ₹300) on spending ₹30,000 in a billing cycle
1 additional PVR INOX Movie Ticket (worth up to ₹300) on spending ₹40,000 in a billing cycle
1 additional PVR INOX Movie Ticket (worth up to ₹300) on spending ₹50,000 in a billing cycle

additionalBenefits: 20% instant discount on Food & Beverages at PVR INOX theaters, app, or website
5% instant discount on movie tickets booked at PVR INOX theaters, app, or website
Complimentary entry to premium PVR INOX in-cinema lounges
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹500 and ₹5,000 (max ₹3,500 per anniversary year)
internalNotes: Vouchers are M-Coupons worth up to Rs 300. Movie tickets earned can be claimed within 2 billing cycles and are valid for 60 days. Spends on rent, wallet, and gaming do not count towards spend thresholds.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
